zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud Sydenham於1230年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾鐵其馬緒時，她的父親Sir William De Sydenham, Lord Titchmarsh31歲，母親Christian Sanford19歲。她於1244年與John de Lovell II在英國奧可福爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1255年在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾拉普斯頓享年25歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud Sydenham于1230年出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾鐵其馬緒时，她的父亲Sir William De Sydenham, Lord Titchmarsh31岁，母亲Christian Sanford19岁。她于1244年与John de Lovell II在英国奧可福爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1255年在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾拉普斯頓享年25岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sydenham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Sydenham in Bridgwater (Somerset), Sydenham Damerel (Devon), and Sydenham (Oxon).

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud Sydenham was born in 1230, in Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir William De Sydenham, Lord Titchmarsh, was 31 and her mother, Christian Sanford, was 19. She married John de Lovell II in 1244, in Oxfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1255, in Thrapston, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 25.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud Sydenham est née en 1230, à Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William De Sydenham, Lord Titchmarsh, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Christian Sanford, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé John de Lovell II en 1244, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1255, à Thrapston, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 25 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud Sydenham 1230 in Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William De Sydenham, Lord Titchmarsh 31 und ihre Mutter Christian Sanford 19. Sie hat 1244 in Oxfordshire, England John de Lovell II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1255 im Alter von 25 Jahren in Thrapston, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Sydenham è nata il nel 1230 nel Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir William De Sydenham, Lord Titchmarsh, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Christian Sanford, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato John de Lovell II nel 1244, nel Oxfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1255, nel Thrapston, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 25 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud Sydenhamが1230年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアティトチマーッシュで生まれた時，父Sir William De Sydenham, Lord Titchmarshは31歳，母Christian Sanfordは19歳であった。1244年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアでJohn de Lovell IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1255年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアスラプストンで25歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud Sydenham(이)가 1230년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 티트ch마시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William De Sydenham, Lord Titchmarsh(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Christian Sanford(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1244년 영국 스퍼드실르에서 John de Lovell II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1255년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 스라프스턴에서 25세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Sydenham nasceu em 1230, em Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William De Sydenham, Lord Titchmarsh, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Christian Sanford, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Lovell II em 1244, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1255, em Thrapston, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 25 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud Sydenham родилась в 1230 г. в местности тичмарш, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir William De Sydenham, Lord Titchmarsh было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Christian Sanford, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Lovell II в 1244 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1255 г. в местности трапстон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 25 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maud Sydenham nació en 1230, en Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William De Sydenham, Lord Titchmarsh, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Christian Sanford, tenía 19 años. Se casó con John de Lovell II en 1244, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1255, en Thrapston, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 25 años.
